title: Backport: Add restart-sec option to systemd generate
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name.  Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
This PR add new parameter called `restart-sec` to `podman generate systemd` command. This parameter is used to set `RestartSec` parameter in `[Service]` section of the pod unit in systemd. The `RestartSec` configures the time to sleep before restarting a service. Some users may need to set this variable to make sure the service is controlled by default mechanism.

<!---
Please put your overall PR description here
-->

#### How to verify it
When running following command:
```bash
podman generate systemd --restart-sec 15 pod_name
```
You should see in the pod unit [Service] section `RestartSec=15`.

<!---
Please specify the precise conditions and/or the specific test(s) which must pass.
-->

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *machacekondra* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **saschagrunert** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @saschagrunert` in a comment when ready. Why backport a _feature_?  We usually don't do that.

> Here is [the bug](https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2030195) tracking this backport

Thanks! Let's see if we get an ACK for backporting.
@vrothberg It seems like we got the ACK
@mheon, do we have green light in https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2030195?  I am always worried if there's a special flag we have to wait for.
I think we're good to proceed? Missing some flags but the stakeholders are buying in.
We do need a new PR, though, this is approved for the v3.4.2-rhel branch, not v3.4

> @machacekondra please create new PR

Opened here: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12602
